commit_scope: Embody cell voice across source carrier tissue with a Form-owned whole-body query

commands: git diff --check -- Makefile README.md cli/README.md mcp-server/README.md skills/coherence-network/SKILL.md docs/shared/cell-voice-protocol.md docs/shared/agent-start-packet.md docs/coherence-substrate/form-language.md docs/system_audit/commit_evidence_2026-06-07_form_cell_voice_tissue.json docs/system_audit/commit_evidence_2026-06-07_rust_default_source_inventory_rebalance.json form/form-kernel-rust/src/main.rs form/form-kernel-ts/src/kernel.ts form/scripts/pyfkb-run.sh form/form-stdlib/carrier-tissue.fk form/form-stdlib/queries/carrier-tissue-census.fk form/form-stdlib/queries/cell-voice-tissue.fk form/form-stdlib/tests/carrier-tissue-kernel-query-band.fk form/form-stdlib/tests/cell-voice-tissue-band.fk
local_validation.summary: The Form query walks 5329 repository files and 2062708 LOC through the active kernel source_inventory primitive and returns carrier-family cell voices for Form, Form binary, Form surface, Python, Python runtime, Python HTTP, Python API, TypeScript, JavaScript, Go, Rust, Markdown, JSON, YAML, shell, assets, and local field memory. The next release question is JSON tissue: load repeated schemas/configs as cells or keep as external data with schema. source_inventory is now bound in Go, Rust, and TypeScript; portable voice semantics validate across sibling kernels with a static row proof.

known_failed_attempts.command: make cell-voice-tissue and cd form/form-kernel-go && go build -o bin-go . && cd .. && form-kernel-go/bin-go form-stdlib/carrier-tissue.fk form-stdlib/tests/cell-voice-tissue-band.fk
known_failed_attempts.output: Initial Form parse failed with: form-kernel-go: parse error: unclosed `(` opened at line 7 col 1 in `(do ...)` (reached end of input). Fixed by closing ct-voice-for-carrier before ct-cell-voice-summary-from-root.

Initial sibling validation diverged because the test used source_inventory: go = 255, rust = unbound function: source_inventory, typescript = unbound source_inventory. The band was changed to static rows so Go/Rust/TypeScript validate carrier voice semantics separately. A follow-up rebalance then bound source_inventory in Rust and TypeScript so the whole-repo inventory primitive is no longer owned by one kernel.

ci_validation.reason: No commit, push, or PR was created in this turn.

phase_gate.reason: Local proof passed, but CI and production deploy validation remain pending until the work is committed, pushed, and shipped.

evidence_refs: form/form-stdlib/carrier-tissue.fk adds CT-TAG-VOICE, ct-voice accessors, ct-voice-for-carrier, and ct-cell-voice-summary-from-root.
form/form-stdlib/queries/cell-voice-tissue.fk exposes the whole-repository carrier voice read.
form/form-stdlib/carrier-tissue.fk uses CT-TAG-CENSUS as the census structure tag so full source-inventory parity does not depend on renderer-specific string quoting.
form/form-stdlib/tests/carrier-tissue-kernel-query-band.fk validates the tagged census query across sibling kernels.
form/form-stdlib/tests/cell-voice-tissue-band.fk validates carrier voice semantics across sibling kernels without depending on source_inventory.

docs/shared/cell-voice-protocol.md and docs/shared/agent-start-packet.md name make cell-voice-tissue as the whole-body carrier voice read and state that the default full source walk is Rust-carried while source_inventory is now present in Go/Rust/TypeScript.
docs/coherence-substrate/form-language.md and docs/field/urs/welcoming-doorway-walk.md connect the practice to Form and to release/being decisions across all source tissue.
Generated README.md, cli/README.md, mcp-server/README.md, and skills/coherence-network/SKILL.md include the updated shared fragments.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: A maintainer or agent can now ask the whole source body, through Form, what each carrier tissue is, why it exists, what health looks like, what it wants and needs, and what would make release honest.
test_flows: make cell-voice-tissue returns cell-voice-tissue for 5329 files and 2062708 LOC.
The returned voices include Form, Python, Python HTTP, TypeScript, Go, Rust, Markdown, JSON, YAML, shell, asset, and local-field carrier families.
The returned next-release-question names JSON as the current carrier family to tend.
cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/carrier-tissue.fk form-stdlib/queries/carrier-tissue-census.fk returns 1 ok, 0 divergent with [65202, false, 5329, 2062708, ...].
cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/carrier-tissue.fk form-stdlib/tests/carrier-tissue-kernel-query-band.fk returns 1 ok, 0 divergent.
cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/carrier-tissue.fk form-stdlib/tests/cell-voice-tissue-band.fk returns 1 ok, 0 divergent.

known_runtime_context.source_inventory_scope: The whole-repository inventory path currently defaults to the Rust kernel through make cell-voice-tissue. Go, Rust, and TypeScript now bind source_inventory, so the whole query can move with the active kernel rotation; the static-row band remains useful as a small semantic proof.
known_runtime_context.wellness_notes: make wellness passed. It still names JSON/system_audit evidence and generated agent-start memory as static-to-dynamic wants, which aligns with the new cell voice tissue read.
